overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a sci-fi video game showing a character in a white and red spacesuit exploring a dimly lit underground settlement. The character walks through an open dirt plaza, ascends a long stone staircase, and navigates narrow alleyways between industrial stone buildings with artificial lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: open settlement plaza with dirt ground and elevated platforms

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the open dirt plaza toward a large stone staircase

notable_agents.action: two figures standing stationary on an elevated platform near the stairs

entered.detail: raised stone platform with metal railings where NPCs are standing
wide stone staircase with metal handrails leading upward
industrial cargo containers stacked on the dirt ground
bright artificial lighting fixtures mounted on poles and structures

segments.scene_description: The character walks through an open underground plaza with dirt ground, approaching a stone staircase in the distance. Two NPCs stand on an elevated platform near the stairs, and industrial containers are stacked to the left while floodlights illuminate the scene from the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: enclosed stone staircase between rough rock walls

events.description: character begins ascending the long stone staircase

agents.ego_description: climbing the weathered stone steps while holding the metal handrails

entered.detail: rough textured rock walls flanking the staircase
silver metal handrails running alongside the stone steps
wooden overhang structure with railings above the stairs

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a long enclosed stone staircase with metal handrails, flanked by rough rock walls and industrial lighting. The staircase leads upward through the settlement, with a wooden balcony structure visible on the right side.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow alleyway between stone buildings with industrial signage

events.description: exits staircase into narrow upper alley passage between buildings
turns right at intersection in the narrow alleyway

agents.ego_description: navigating through narrow passages, turning corners, and approaching additional stairs

entered.detail: confined walkway between tall stone building structures
large illuminated yellow circular emblem mounted on building wall
industrial metal door frame set into the stone wall
additional stone steps leading further upward in the settlement

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the staircase into a narrow alleyway between stone buildings, passing a prominent yellow circular sign on the right wall. After turning right at an intersection, the character continues along an upper walkway toward a secondary set of stairs, with metal railings lining the path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an open underground plaza into the narrow, elevated corridors of an industrial settlement. It begins with the character traversing a dirt plaza past stacked containers and floodlights, moving steadily toward a distant stone staircase where NPCs wait on an elevated platform. As the character reaches the stairs, the scene shifts into a confined ascent along rough rock walls and metal handrails, passing a wooden balcony structure. The camera then follows the character as they emerge from the staircase into a narrow alleyway, passing a prominent yellow circular sign on a stone wall. Finally, the path turns right at an intersection, leading the character along an upper walkway with metal railings toward a secondary set of stairs.
